items.name_cn:
Premium Reproduction Fendi
💗FEND1 iconic Peekaboo ISeeU handbag, petite and cute. Red with layered Nappa soft leather, accented with classic turn-lock on both sides. Lined interior with two compartments separated by hard partitions, featuring a pocket and silver hardware. Includes handle and adjustable detachable shoulder strap, for hand or crossbody carry. Made in Italy.
Dimensions 11-20-15
Style 8336

FÉŃĎI TOTE Tote Bag "Sunshine Handbag"
Simple letter LOGO design, amber double handles are the biggest focal point of the bag, looks powerful just by holding it, and doesn't dig into the hand. items.name_en: Small 👄FENDI New Versace by Fendi series iconic square Baguette mini bag, white smooth leather material, with three Medusa metal pin decorations on the front flap. FF clasp, with black organic glass and pins. Magnetic snap, purple satin lining interior pocket with inner pocket and gold-finish metal hardware. Comes with a long handle, can be carried underarm. Model: FD8066, Dimensions: 20*13*5cm

items.name_cn:
Small Coffee Brown🔥🔥
New By The Way Selleria pillow bag is here. Natural grain calfskin feels incredibly soft and lightweight. The strap can be tied casually for a relaxed vibe. The silver metal keyring pendant allows for easy accessory matching. The interior features hand-stitched Roman calfskin embossing, simple yet premium. It transforms into a clutch with a light press, and storage is effortless!
Small: 20x9x12cm
Medium: 29x13x17cm

Small Monogram
New FENDI First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, this is the first FENDI bag, overturning previous shapes. Metal trim and large logo lock combined with the body design deconstructs architectural art and fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for evening clutching, and crossbody gives a high-end street chic feel!
Small Size 26x9.5x18cm

items.name_en: Sunshine Mini Tote, fabric material, fully adorned with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, accented with transparent sequins. Black leather FENDI ROMA lettering and tortoiseshell-effect hard resin glass handle. Lined interior compartment, black leather trim, and gold metal hardware. Features two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, for hand-carry or shoulder wear.
items.name_cn:
Sunshine Mini Tote, fabric material, fully adorned with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, accented with transparent sequins. Black leather FENDI ROMA lettering and tortoiseshell-effect hard resin glass handle. Lined interior compartment, black leather trim, and gold metal hardware. Features two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, for hand-carry or shoulder wear.
Size 13/6.5/18cm
